message.content: How do I configure the terminal colors in ghostty? I want to test my new color scheme.

content.text: To configure terminal colors in ghostty, edit your config file at ~/.config/ghostty/config. You can test color themes by setting background and foreground values directly.

message.content: I ran the test suite but got an error: config file not found.

content.text: The error occurs because ghostty expects the config directory to exist. Run: mkdir -p ~/.config/ghostty. That should resolve the config file not found error. Fixed by creating the directory.
